subcodes.first_line: O divine herald! Though numerous letters were received from thee, thy recent letter brought joy to this illumined heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی از تو نامههای متعدده رسید ولی مکتوب اخیر دلیل سرور قلب منیر بود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @the power of words; of speech
